subcodes.first_line: The one true God hath adorned man with the ornament of utterance, and this utterance is his alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند یکتا انسان را بطراز بیان مزین فرمود و این بیان مخصوصست باو
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @equality of men and women
